overall.description: A stationary shot from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showing a triple-stack digital billboard in Night City cycling through various advertisements. The camera observes from a covered pedestrian walkway as futuristic traffic passes through an intersection below, with neon-lit skyscrapers visible in the background under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with triple-stack digital billboard

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of digital billboard and street traffic from covered walkway

notable_agents.action: futuristic red car driving through intersection
person walking along sidewalk near overpass

entered.detail: three-tiered digital display showing animated advertisements including FEEL THE FUTURE and cartoon characters
futuristic building with distinctive blue circular balconies and red structural elements
tall skyscrapers with vertical neon advertisements and holographic displays
tall pole with multiple traffic signals and street lights
elevated walkway with stairs connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: A stationary view from a covered pedestrian walkway overlooking a futuristic city intersection. The triple-stack digital billboard dominates the center foreground, cycling through colorful animated advertisements. In the background, futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection while pedestrians walk along the sidewalks, with tall glass towers and neon signage visible against a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with triple-stack digital billboard

events.description: digital billboard transitions from colorful advertisements to news broadcast format with male anchor

agents.ego_description: continuing stationary observation as billboard content shifts to news programming

notable_agents.action: black and white sports car driving through intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene remains at the covered walkway with the digital billboard now displaying a news broadcast featuring a male anchor and various news graphics. Traffic continues to flow through the intersection below, with different vehicles passing by. The urban backdrop of glass towers and neon signage remains consistent.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with triple-stack digital billboard

events.description: billboard switches from news to mixed commercial content including food ads, PSAs, and product promotions
yellow sports car speeds through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: observing the final cycle of billboard advertisements including public service announcements

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car speeding through intersection

segments.scene_description: The digital billboard cycles through final advertisements including ALL Foods branding, perfume commercials, anti-drug PSAs with 'never fade away' text, and public health warnings. A yellow sports car speeds through the intersection, adding dynamic movement to the otherwise static urban scene. The camera maintains its fixed position throughout, capturing the continuous flow of the futuristic city life.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary perspective from a covered pedestrian walkway, observing a bustling futuristic intersection as a massive digital billboard cycles through a series of vivid displays. It begins with the triple-stack screen flashing colorful animated advertisements while futuristic vehicles and pedestrians move through the neon-lit urban landscape below. As the display shifts, the advertisements give way to a news broadcast featuring a male anchor and scrolling graphics, while the flow of traffic continues steadily against a backdrop of glass towers. The scene then transitions through a final sequence of branding for ALL Foods, perfume commercials, and anti-drug PSAs, before a yellow sports car speeds through the intersection to add a burst of dynamic movement to the static frame.
